review.reason: The frozen benchmark completed all 40/40 runs with correctness checks passing. Sequential produced 15 replay-verified UNSAT leaves plus one independently validated new orbit; kmtotalizer produced 8 replay-verified UNSAT leaves, all overlapping sequential, and 12 UNKNOWN results. Kmtotalizer therefore earned zero unique independently verified coverage and is not expanded. Redirect post-benchmark allocation to the audited five-orbit frontier, sequential cheap harvesting, obstruction relaxations, and constructive near-cover routes.
